emergency_definition: no heat in winter when it's below 40 degrees outside
AC completely out when it's over 100 degrees

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_action: leave a message and guarantee a 30-minute callback

non_emergency_routing_rules: go to voicemail and call back the next business day
integration_constraints: never create a job for a warranty callback in ServiceTitan
never promise same-day service unless it's an emergency
always get a callback number before ending any call
after_hours_flow_summary: Emergency calls are routed to on-call tech, then to secondary contact if needed. Non-emergency calls go to voicemail and are returned the next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: Calls are answered by AI agent, who transfers caller to a representative after a brief description of their issue.
special_instructions: use separate warranty portal for warranty callbacks
notes: Use professional greeting during business hours
